Aufgrund von PowerPoint-Bugs gibt es fol:
Due to PowerPoint bugs, there are the following limitations:
- Text outline can be set but not removed again
- Color gradients are only supported for the background (not lines)
- Color gradients (esp. angle) are not always transferred correctly
- Shadows are not applied to groups
- Cap/join type of lines are not set
Auslassungspunkte sind drei kurz aufeina: An ellipsis is three closely-spaced dots. It usually indicates an omission of part of the text.

Hier kann ein regulärer Ausdruck auf all: Here you can apply a regular expression to all selected cells. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
Hier kann ein regulärer Ausdruck in alle: Here you can search for a regular expression in all selected cells and count the number of matches. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
Here you can search and replace a regular expression in all selected cells. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.
Hier kann eine Formel auf alle markierte: Here you can apply a formula to all selected cells. If the cell content should not be at the beginning, you can use the placeholders $cell and $cellvalue. By default the resulting value is inserted (if the formula is not faulty). If your input begins with '=', a formula is created. The selection box contains examples of possible inputs.

Shapes werden bei Shape-Anordnung in Tab: Shapes are arranged {} in table cells when arranging shapes.
Shapes werden bei Shape-Anordnung in:\n\:
When arranging shapes, shapes are:

- arranged horizontally and vertically centered in table cells,
- centered horizontally in shapes if the shape is taller than wide, and centered vertically if the shape is wider than tall,
- in text paragraphs centered vertically on the first line and not changed horizontally.
Shapes werden links angeordnet und verti: Shapes are arranged left and not changed vertically.
Shapes werden oben angeordnet und horizo: Shapes are arranged at the top and not changed horizontally.
Shapes werden rechts angeordnet und vert: Shapes are arranged right and not changed vertically.
Shapes werden unten angeordnet und horiz: Shapes are arranged at the bottom and not changed horizontally.
Shapes werden vertikal zentriert angeord: Shapes are arranged vertically centered and not changed horizontally.
Shapes werden vertikal zentriert von dem: Shapes are arranged vertically centered on the text in the first line and not changed horizontally.
Shapes are arranged vertically centered on the text in the first line and horizontally left.
Shapes are arranged vertically centered on the text in the first line and horizontally right.
Shapes are arranged vertically centered on the text in the first line and horizontally centered.
Shapes werden zentriert angeordnet und v: Shapes are arranged centered and not changed vertically.

Sorry, aber Microsoft hat die Funktion z: Sorry, but Microsoft did not implement the function to disable the text outline in the interface.
Sprache aller Shapes auf allen Folien (i: Change the language of all shapes on all slides (incl. the presentation's default language)?
Sprache aller Shapes auf ausgewählten Fo: Change the language of all shapes on the selected slides?
Start- und Stopp-Position zum Schneiden:
Enter the start and stop position for cutting, separated by ":". If no start position is given, it is set to 0. If no stop position is given, it is set to the end of the text. A negative position means it is calculated from the end of the text.

  Example for "ABCDEF":
  [2:]   = CDEF  Remove the first two characters
  [:2]   = AB    Remove everything after the second character
  [-2:]  = EF    Remove everything up to the second-to-last character
  [2:-2] = CD    Remove 2 characters at the start and end
Suche auf {} Folien von Foliennummer {}: Search on {} slides from slide number {} to {}.

Text angleichen für gewähltes Shape nich: Match text is not available for the selected shape.
Text eingeben, der auf alle Shapes angew:
Enter the text to apply to all shapes. The following placeholders are available:

${text}:		Inserts the existing shape text
$text_len:	Number of characters in the existing text
$counter:	Numbering (continues if the first shape contains a number)
$counter_a/A:	Numbering with lower- or uppercase letters
$counter_i/I:	Numbering with Roman numerals (e.g. xi or XI)
Text eingeben, der hinter alle Zellen ge:
Enter the text to append to all cells. Existing formulas are overwritten and replaced with values.

Possible placeholders: [counter], [row], [column].
Text eingeben, der vor alle Zellen gesch:
Enter the text to prepend to all cells. Existing formulas are overwritten and replaced with values.

Possible placeholders: [counter], [row], [column].
